Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Total protein and globulin are low, which may indicate decreased protein synthesis or increased loss. Lipid profile reveals high total cholesterol, LDL, and triglycerides, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including liver enzymes and electrolytes, are within normal limits. Renal and cardiovascular evaluation is recommended.
